channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Jill Biden memoir reveals concerns over Biden’s debate performance and aftermath of 2024 campaign
item.description: In a newly published memoir, Jill Biden recounts her concerns during Joe Biden’s widely criticised 2024 presidential debate against Donald Trump. She describes watching the event with alarm as the pre...

item.title: Jill Biden says Joe Biden’s poor 2024 debate performance alarmed her and intensified concerns about his health
item.description: Former first lady Jill Biden revealed in a recent interview that she feared then-president Joe Biden might have been suffering a stroke while watching his widely criticized debate performance against ...

item.title: Sarb increases repo rate to 7% as oil-driven inflation pressures grow
item.description: The South African Reserve Bank (Sarb) has increased the repo rate by 25 basis points to 7%, resulting in the prime lending rate rising to 10.5%. Reserve Bank Governor Lesetja Kganyago announced the de...

item.title: Life After Fame: The KFC Couple’s Journey Seven Years On
item.description: Hector Mkansi and Nonhlanhla Soldaat, famously known as the 'KFC couple', continue to thrive in their marriage seven years after their viral proposal at a KFC in 2019. The couple tied the knot on New ...

item.title: Tanzania launches tender process to build 56 sports schools nationwide
item.description: Tanzania has officially started the tendering process for constructing 56 sports schools all over the country, marking a major push in the government's efforts to improve sports and education together...

item.title: High Court rejects Sh528m compensation case against Tanzania Airports Authority over KIA land dispute
item.description: The High Court in the Arusha Sub-Registry has dismissed a compensation lawsuit filed by Kibo Poultry Unit Limited against the Tanzania Airports Authority (TAA), which was seeking over Sh528.7 million ...

item.title: Antony Gitonga Tops Early Poll in Othaya Parliamentary Race Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: A new opinion poll conducted by Swiss Polls has placed Dr Antony Gitonga as the frontrunner in the race for the Othaya parliamentary seat ahead of the 2027 General Election. The survey shows Gitonga l...

item.title: Salem district allows online applications for free silt and clay excavation for farmers and potters
item.description: The Salem district administration in Tamil Nadu has announced that farmers and potters can now apply online through e-Sevai centres to excavate and transport silt, clay, and ordinary earth free of cos...

item.title: Jannik Sinner eliminated in second round of French Open due to heat exhaustion
item.description: Formidable Italian tennis player Jannik Sinner was unexpectedly knocked out of the French Open in the second round after a grueling match against Argentina's Juan Manuel Cerundolo. Ranked 56th in the ...

item.title: Serengeti Boys target historic AFCON U-17 final after semi-final clash with Egypt
item.description: Tanzania’s national Under-17 football team, the Serengeti Boys, are preparing for a crucial CAF U-17 Africa Cup of Nations semi-final match against Egypt, scheduled to take place in Morocco at the Sta...

item.title: Trump refiles defamation lawsuit against Wall Street Journal citing Maxwell interview
item.description: President Donald Trump has refiled his $10 billion defamation lawsuit against the Wall Street Journal in federal court in Miami. The lawsuit targets a 2025 Wall Street Journal article claiming a lewd ...

item.title: Remulla Discusses Legal Options with Estrada Ahead of Expected Arrest Over Flood Control Projects
item.description: Interior Secretary Jonvic Remulla has confirmed that he already talked to Senator Jinggoy Estrada regarding options available to him following the expected issuance of a warrant of arrest by the Sandi...

item.title: Stormers back Khan and Feinberg-Mngomezulu partnership ahead of Cardiff quarter-final
item.description: The Stormers will rely heavily on the growing partnership between scrumhalf Imad Khan and flyhalf Sacha Feinberg-Mngomezulu when they face Cardiff in their United Rugby Championship quarter-final in C...

item.title: Neymar Faces Uncertainty For Brazil’s World Cup Opener After Calf Injury
item.description: Neymar, the 34-year-old forward from Santos, dey face wahala as e fit miss Brazil first game for 2026 World Cup because e injure him calf. Brazil national team doctor, Rodrigo Lasmar, talk say Neymar ...

item.title: Kenyans react to police communication during Utumishi Girls Academy dormitory fire as parents seek updates on victims
item.description: A tragic fire incident at Utumishi Girls Academy in Gilgil has left the country in shock after a dormitory blaze at around 3am claimed the lives of 16 students and left more than 70 others injured. Th...

item.title: Ruto Defends Fuel Subsidy Policy and Says Transport Strike Was Called Off Voluntarily
item.description: Kenyan President William Ruto has pushed back against claims that his government pressured transport sector leaders to cancel their strike. In remarks at the National Prayer Breakfast, he described th...

item.title: Pentagon Loan to Vulcan Elements Accelerated by White House Intervention Linked to Trump Jr.
item.description: Defense Department records and reporting by ProPublica reveal that a $620 million Pentagon loan to the North Carolina startup Vulcan Elements, linked to Donald Trump Jr., was directly influenced by Wh...

item.title: Couple in Nova Scotia faces charges after infant remains found, to appear in Halifax court for bail
item.description: Authorities in Nova Scotia have charged a local couple following the discovery of the remains of an infant. The couple is scheduled to appear in Halifax court for a bail hearing. Law enforcement has n...

item.title: Augustus Kyalo Muli appointed EACCIA Committee Chair for Membership and Partnerships
item.description: The East African Chamber of Commerce, Industry, and Agriculture (EACCIA) has appointed Kenyan businessman Augustus Kyalo Muli as the Chairperson of its Committee on Membership and Partnerships. The ap...

item.title: Durban model Neetasha Singh represents South Africa on Cannes Film Festival red carpet
item.description: Phoenix-born Durban model and businesswoman Neetasha Singh recently attended the 79th Cannes Film Festival in France, describing the experience as life-changing. Invited by Women in Film and Televisio...
